title: arnica parryi subsp. genuina
intro: Arnica parryi subsp. genuina is a subspecies of the arnica plant, specifically a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Arnica parryi subsp. genuina include reducing pain and swelling, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into topical creams, salves, and ointments, which are often used externally to soothe injuries and skin irritations.
